positive: A stylized, whimsical silhouette of a forest creature (e.g., a fox, deer, or owl) gracefully leaping through a meadow filled with oversized, bioluminescent floral elements and floating geometric shapes. The style should be minimalist flat vector art combined with detailed engraved linework, featuring a strong silhouette against a deep indigo or midnight blue background. Use limited color palette with muted earth tones (sage green, terracotta, cream) and pops of luminous gold for the glowing flowers and outlines. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed for a clean, high-contrast apparel print. Crisp lines, perfect negative space.
negative: blur, noise, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, multiple limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text, signature, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, messy, muddy color, cartoonish, realistic photo, oil painting, gradient shading
